effects.title: Scramble reveal
effects.desc: Letters cycle through random characters before resolving to the real text when the element enters the viewport. Creates a decoding or transmission effect.
effects.example: Heading enters view → X@K#9 → PROJECTS in ~800ms. Each character resolves left-to-right with a 30ms stagger.

effects.title: Typewriter with erase loop
effects.desc: Text types out character-by-character, pauses, deletes, and replaces with an alternate string. Loops indefinitely for hero subtitles with multiple identities.
effects.example: 'I build things that ship.' → erases → 'I ship things that last.' → loops. ~60ms per character, 1.5s pause at end.

effects.title: Split-word hover warp
effects.desc: Each word is independently wrapped. On hover, that word skews or rotates slightly on its axis, like a lens passing over it.
effects.example: Hover over 'BUILT' → that word tilts ~5° on Y-axis and returns. Other words unaffected.

effects.title: Counter odometer
effects.desc: Numbers count up from zero on viewport entry. Each digit rolls through like a slot machine. Used for stats, years, counts.
effects.example: 0 → 250+ resumes analyzed, counting at ~15 per frame. Eases out near the target.

effects.title: Gradient text sweep
effects.desc: A shimmer passes over display text in a loop. Text is transparent and clips an animated gradient background.
effects.example: Hero name has a slow left-to-right light sweep every 4s — as if a spotlight passes across it.

effects.title: Glitch flicker
effects.desc: Text briefly corrupts with RGB channel offsets and clip-path slices — like a VHS glitch. Triggers on hover or on a timer. 3–5 frames, very fast.
effects.example: Hover 'EXPERIENCE' → red and blue ghost offsets appear for 80ms then snap clean. Each trigger is slightly different.

effects.title: Blinking cursor caret
effects.desc: A thin blinking cursor | appears after any typewriter or static heading, reinforcing the terminal/code aesthetic. Pure CSS, single pseudo-element.
effects.example: 'Available 2026|' — the caret blinks at 1s intervals. Stops blinking when the line finishes typing.

effects.title: Redacted reveal
effects.desc: Text starts fully redacted (black bars covering each word). On viewport entry or hover, bars dissolve left-to-right to reveal the real content underneath.
effects.example: '████ ████ ████' → scrolls into view → bars shrink away word by word to reveal 'What I've Built'.

effects.title: Line draw underline
effects.desc: Hovering a nav link or heading draws an SVG underline from left to right via stroke-dashoffset animation. Much more refined than a plain CSS underline.
effects.example: Hover 'Projects' in nav → a hand-drawn style underline traces itself in 300ms. Erases in reverse on mouse-leave.

effects.title: Morphing headline
effects.desc: The hero headline's words physically rearrange and resize between two states as you hover or scroll. Uses FLIP animation for performant layout transitions.
effects.example: Default: 'I build things.' Hover → words spread apart, 'build' grows to 3x, 'things' fades. Like a poster reformatting itself.

effects.title: Ambient glow color shift
effects.desc: A radial gradient behind all sections slowly transitions hue as sections scroll into view. Each section has an assigned color that cross-fades at 1.2s.
effects.example: Projects → indigo glow. Scroll to Experience → shifts to amber over 1.2s. No hard cuts.

effects.title: Kinetic hero exit
effects.desc: Name block and subtitle have different scroll-driven Y offsets and opacity curves. They dissolve upward at slightly different rates.
effects.example: Name exits at translateY(-60px), subtitle at -30px, both fade by 40% scroll depth. Feels like a camera dolly.

effects.title: Reading progress bar
effects.desc: A 1–2px line at the top of the viewport fills from left to right as the user scrolls. Zero dependencies.
effects.example: At 50% scroll depth the bar is exactly half full. Color matches the current section's accent.

effects.title: Section number counter
effects.desc: A fixed indicator shows '02 / 05' style numbering that ticks forward as you scroll between named sections.
effects.example: 02 / 05 sits at left center on desktop, updates on IntersectionObserver with a 200ms fade.

effects.title: Stagger card reveal
effects.desc: Grid items enter with a 60–80ms stagger between each. More dramatic than a plain fade-in.
effects.example: 4 cards: card 1 at 0ms, card 2 at 60ms, card 3 at 120ms — all with translateY(24px → 0) and fade.

effects.title: Horizontal marquee ticker
effects.desc: A continuous scrolling strip of tech stack items moves left on loop. Pauses or reverses on hover.
effects.example: React · Next.js · Firebase · Tailwind · scrolling left at 40px/s. Hover → pause.

effects.title: Scroll-jacked vinyl speed
effects.desc: Vinyl rotation speed is driven by scroll velocity. Fast scroll → fast spin. Scroll up → reverse spin.
effects.example: Rapid downscroll makes the vinyl blur-spin. Let go and it coasts to a stop.

effects.title: Parallax layer stack
effects.desc: Multiple layers in the hero (background, midground, text) move at different rates on scroll — deeper layers move slower. Depth without WebGL.
effects.example: Background texture moves at 0.2x scroll speed, vinyl at 0.5x, heading at 1x. Creates 3D depth as you scroll down.

effects.title: Scroll-triggered line draw
effects.desc: An SVG connector line or decorative element draws itself as it enters the viewport via stroke-dashoffset. Draws at a speed tied to scroll position.
effects.example: A vertical timeline line draws downward as you scroll through the Experience section, revealing each job as it catches up.

effects.title: Section fade-in blur
effects.desc: Sections enter from slightly blurred (blur: 6px) and transparent, resolving to sharp and fully visible on entry. More cinematic than a plain opacity fade.
effects.example: Experience section is blur(6px) opacity(0) off-screen. Enters viewport → transitions to blur(0) opacity(1) in 600ms.

effects.title: Sticky section title
effects.desc: Each section's heading sticks to the top of the viewport as you scroll through its content, then unsticks when the next section arrives. Pure CSS.
effects.example: 'Where I've Worked' sticks at 24px from top while scrolling through job entries. Replaced by 'What I've Built' when that section arrives.

effects.title: Scroll-driven clip reveal
effects.desc: Content is masked by a clip-path that expands as you scroll — like a curtain lifting. Uses the native CSS scroll-timeline API, no JS.
effects.example: Project cards are hidden behind a rect clip-path. As you scroll, the clip expands downward revealing more cards pixel-by-pixel.

effects.title: Custom cursor
effects.desc: Replaces the system cursor with a styled element. Scales up on hover over links, morphs on hover over vinyls. Fine-pointer only.
effects.example: Default: 12px ring. Over links: scales to 28px. Over vinyl: becomes a hand icon.

effects.title: Magnetic button
effects.desc: Buttons attract the cursor when within ~80px. The button nudges toward the cursor. Both snap back with spring on mouse-leave.
effects.example: Cursor enters 80px of 'Get in touch' → button drifts max 8px toward cursor. Mouse leaves → spring snap in ~200ms.

effects.title: Cursor trail particles
effects.desc: Small fading particles follow the cursor with ~300ms decay. Canvas-based. Matches the current section's accent color.
effects.example: Move cursor quickly → burst of 6 small indigo dots trailing behind, each fading opacity 1 → 0 over 300ms.

effects.title: Hover ripple
effects.desc: Clicking anywhere on a dark section emits a circular ripple from the click point, expanding and fading over 600ms.
effects.example: Click hero background → a 2px-border circle expands to ~200px diameter and fades. Outline ring only, no fill.

effects.title: Cursor label follow
effects.desc: A small text label follows the cursor when hovering specific elements — showing a contextual hint. Disappears on mouse-leave.
effects.example: Hover a project card → a small label 'View project' trails the cursor at 8px offset. Hover the vinyl → label says 'Scratch me'.

effects.title: Elastic cursor blob
effects.desc: The custom cursor is an SVG blob that stretches and deforms based on movement velocity. Fast moves elongate it in the direction of travel.
effects.example: Slow cursor: perfect circle. Fast rightward swipe: blob stretches into a horizontal oval, snaps back on stop.

effects.title: Cursor color sync
effects.desc: The custom cursor ring changes color to match the current section's ambient color. Transitions smoothly alongside the background glow shift.
effects.example: On Projects: cursor ring is indigo. Scroll to Contact: cursor shifts to emerald. Matches the ambient glow exactly.

effects.title: 3D holographic card tilt
effects.desc: Cards tilt on X/Y axes (up to 8°) tracking cursor position. A specular highlight overlay moves inversely. Spring-smooth on mouse-leave.
effects.example: Cursor at top-left → card tilts rotateX(4deg) rotateY(-4deg), highlight shifts to match. Mouse leaves → springs flat.

effects.title: Card flip on double-click
effects.desc: Double-clicking a project card rotates it 180° to reveal a back face with tech stack and links. Flip back on second double-click.
effects.example: Double-click 'Resumit' → flips to reveal stack, a one-liner, and a GitHub link. Smooth 400ms ease.

effects.title: Spotlight hover
effects.desc: A radial gradient spotlight follows the cursor over dark cards, revealing a brighter version of the background. Card doesn't move.
effects.example: Move cursor over dark card → 200px soft glow follows it, as if holding a torch. Stops on mouse-leave.

effects.title: Vinyl scratchable record
effects.desc: RAF-driven vinyl. Click-drag to rotate it manually, pausing the spin. Release to coast back to speed. Web Audio crackle on grab.
effects.example: Drag left → vinyl follows delta, spinning backward. Release → RAF eases back to 33RPM. Audio scratch on grab.

effects.title: Hover border trace
effects.desc: On hover, a glowing border traces around the card edges as if being drawn. Uses a rotating conic-gradient clipped to the border path.
effects.example: Mouse enters card → a bright line races around the border perimeter in 600ms, leaving a faint persistent glow.

effects.title: Image parallax on tilt
effects.desc: Inside a tilting card, the thumbnail image shifts in the opposite direction to the tilt — as if it's a window looking into a 3D space.
effects.example: Card tilts left → image inside shifts right by 8px. Creates the illusion of depth between the card frame and its content.

effects.title: Expand to modal
effects.desc: Clicking a project card smoothly expands it into a full-screen modal using Framer Motion's layoutId. The card's position animates to fill the screen.
effects.example: Click Resumit card → it expands from its grid position to a full overlay. Close → contracts back to the exact grid cell.

effects.title: Tag cloud hover scatter
effects.desc: Tech stack tags on a card are normally clustered. On card hover, they scatter to random positions with a spring, then regroup on mouse-leave.
effects.example: Hover project card → React · Firebase · OpenAI tags drift apart by 12–20px each in random directions. Mouse-leave → spring back together.

effects.title: Live availability dot
effects.desc: A pulsing dot next to 'Available' status is driven by a Firebase realtime value. Change the DB field live without a deploy.
effects.example: status: 'available' → green pulse. 'busy' → amber. 'unavailable' → red static.

effects.title: Now playing section card
effects.desc: A persistent mini card styled like a music player shows the current section as a track. Updates as you scroll.
effects.example: Scroll to Experience → card shows ▶ Where I've Worked — 1:42. Time increments in real seconds.

effects.title: GLSL noise background
effects.desc: A slow-moving Perlin noise shader tinted to the current section's accent color. GPU-light as a single fullscreen quad.
effects.example: Projects: dark indigo noise drifts. Experience: dark amber. Transitions follow the 1.2s ambient glow timeline.

effects.title: Star field depth
effects.desc: A very subtle parallax star field (10–15% opacity) drifts slowly in the background. Each star layer moves at a different speed on scroll.
effects.example: 50 tiny white dots distributed across 3 depth layers. Scrolling makes near-stars move faster, distant ones barely drift.

effects.title: Time-of-day tint
effects.desc: The page's ambient glow tint shifts subtly based on the visitor's local time. Warm amber in the evening, cool blue in the morning. Runs once on load.
effects.example: Visit at 9pm → background has a very subtle warm amber cast. Visit at 9am → slightly cooler blue-white. 5% opacity max, never jarring.

effects.title: Visitor count live
effects.desc: A small '14 people visited today' counter near the footer updates via Firebase realtime. Resets at midnight. Adds a sense of liveness.
effects.example: Footer shows 14 visitors today — increments on each unique session. Updates live if two tabs are open.

effects.title: Breathing hero bg
effects.desc: The hero background very slowly scales between 100% and 103% on a 6s loop — like the page is breathing. Subtle enough to be subliminal.
effects.example: Background texture slowly grows and contracts. At 6s period, most visitors won't consciously notice but will feel the page is alive.

effects.title: Ambient sound toggle
effects.desc: A speaker icon activates a faint lo-fi vinyl crackle loop generated entirely in Web Audio — no file needed. Off by default.
effects.example: Click speaker → Web Audio generates pink noise filtered to crackle spectrum at ~8% volume. Toggle off → instant silence.

effects.title: UI click sounds
effects.desc: Every button press plays a synthesized 5ms mechanical click — short sine burst with fast decay. Respects prefers-reduced-motion.
effects.example: Click 'Send Message' → barely-audible tick (800Hz, 5ms decay, gain 0.08).

effects.title: Section ambient tones
effects.desc: Each section has an assigned drone note (very low volume). As you scroll between sections, the tone cross-fades. Completely subliminal.
effects.example: Projects: low drone in D minor. Experience: shifts to F. Only audible on headphones at max volume — felt more than heard.

effects.title: Hover chime
effects.desc: Hovering interactive elements plays a very soft chime (triangle wave, ~200ms). Different pitch per element type — links vs buttons vs cards.
effects.example: Hover a project card → soft 880Hz chime. Hover a nav link → 1200Hz. Gain 0.04 — barely there but satisfying.

effects.title: Name letterpress intro
effects.desc: On first load, the site name assembles letter by letter with a slight bounce on each character's landing. Then the rest of the page fades in.
effects.example: F → FO → FOL → FOLIO. Each letter drops in from y:-20 with a spring. Full name visible by ~800ms, then hero content fades in.

effects.title: Progress loader bar
effects.desc: A thin line at the top of the viewport fills from 0% to 100% as the page's critical assets load, then fades out. Replaces a spinner.
effects.example: DOMContentLoaded at 0%, fonts at 40%, LCP image at 80%, fully interactive at 100%. Bar fades in 300ms after hitting 100%.

effects.title: Cinematic curtain open
effects.desc: Two panels slide apart (or a circle expands) to reveal the page on first load, like a projector starting. Only on the first visit (sessionStorage gate).
effects.example: Two dark panels split left and right over 1.2s, revealing the hero underneath. Doesn't repeat within the same session.

effects.title: Page transition morph
effects.desc: Navigating between pages morphs a shared element (the nav logo or a card) to bridge the old and new page. Avoids abrupt cuts.
effects.example: Click project card → card expands and morphs into the project detail page header. Back button: header contracts back into the grid card.

effects.title: Active section nav highlight
effects.desc: Fixed nav links highlight as their corresponding section occupies most of the viewport. Smooth lerp of a highlight indicator pill.
effects.example: As you scroll from Projects to Experience, the nav pill slides from Projects to Experience with a spring transition.

effects.title: Back-to-top vinyl needle
effects.desc: A custom 'back to top' button styled as a vinyl needle/arm. Clicking it smoothly scrolls to the top and animates the needle lifting.
effects.example: Visible after 30% scroll. Styled as a minimalist tonearm. Click → smooth scroll to top, needle animates lifting off the record.

effects.title: Dev console signature
effects.desc: Styled ASCII art logged to the browser console with %c directives. Includes a hiring link.
effects.example: console.log('%c hey, you found the console.', 'color:#f59e0b') followed by formatted contact line.

effects.title: Konami code modal
effects.desc: Typing ↑↑↓↓←→←→BA triggers a secret modal with mini spinning vinyl and teaser. Dismissed on click or Esc.
effects.example: Type the sequence → modal fades in with 'You found it.', a 60px vinyl at 45RPM, and a teaser line.

effects.title: ?debug=true overlay
effects.desc: Appending ?debug=true activates a fixed HUD showing section name, scroll %, ambient color, and frame rate.
effects.example: Visit ?debug=true → overlay shows § Projects | 34% | indigo | 60fps.

effects.title: Cursor disco idle
effects.desc: After 30s of no interaction, background pulses through hues and cursor leaves rainbow trails. Any input ends it instantly.
effects.example: 30s idle → bg hue rotation begins, cursor trail appears. Move mouse → instant snap back. No announcement.

effects.title: Rage-click egg
effects.desc: Clicking the same element 7+ times in 2 seconds triggers a surprised animation — bounce, rotate, or confetti.
effects.example: Click the vinyl 7 times fast → shudders, plays scratch sound, briefly shows 'ok ok ok'.

effects.title: Hidden /now route
effects.desc: A secret /now page (not linked anywhere) shows current project, reading, and listening — updated manually via Firebase.
effects.example: Visit /now → 'Building: Resumit v2 · Reading: SICP · Listening: Blue Note compilations.'

effects.title: Theme unlock via click pattern
effects.desc: Clicking specific elements in a specific order unlocks an alternate color theme. Persists in localStorage.
effects.example: Click logo → '2026' → vinyl in order → page repaints in sepia/amber theme. Survives refresh until cleared.

effects.title: Alt+click secret link
effects.desc: Alt-clicking (Option on Mac) on the site logo navigates to a hidden page or reveals a hidden piece of content. Completely undocumented.
effects.example: Alt+click the logo → a hidden /colophon page appears with your build stack, fonts used, and design decisions.

effects.title: Long-press haptic
effects.desc: Long-pressing (500ms+) on mobile on a project card triggers a subtle haptic pulse and reveals a hidden context menu with extra options.
effects.example: Long press Resumit card on mobile → vibrate 50ms, a small context sheet rises: Visit live · Copy link · Read case study.

effects.title: Visitor message board
effects.desc: A hidden page (/guestbook or /wall) lets visitors leave a short message. Messages appear in realtime. Linked only from the console egg.
effects.example: Console egg prints: 'leave a note: yoursite.com/wall'. The wall shows 1-line messages from previous visitors, newest first.

effects.title: Canvas ballpit physics
effects.desc: A canvas-based interactive simulation of bouncing balls. Mouse movement repels the balls with simple physics forces.
effects.example: 50 colorful balls bounce inside the container. Pointer hover pushes them away with spring-like force.

effects.title: True Focus reveal
effects.desc: A text sentence where individual words blur/fade when not hovered. Hovering over a word focuses it while blurring adjacent words.
effects.example: Hovering over a word focuses it (blur 0px) and blurs surrounding words (blur 4px, opacity 0.4).

effects.title: Infinite draggable mesh
effects.desc: A grid of cards that can be dragged infinitely in any direction. When cards scroll off-screen, they wrap around to the opposite side.
effects.example: Drag grid of project cards → moves. Moving past boundary wraps cards. Math-only, zero dependencies.

effects.title: Border Beam glowing card
effects.desc: A glowing light beam that races along the border of a card. Leverages CSS animation and SVG stroke-dashoffset.
effects.example: A sleek dark card has a bright border beam that cycles around the perimeter in 4s.

effects.title: Expanding spring search bar
effects.desc: A search button that springs open into a wide search bar on click. Magnifying glass handle morphs into an X button.
effects.example: Click button → width transitions to 200px. Hotkey ⌘K badge displays on focus.

effects.title: Command palette modal
effects.desc: A keyboard-activated search panel (Cmd+K or /) that lets you search and filter the actual playground effects database in real-time.
effects.example: Press Cmd+K or click to open. Type 'glitch' to filter. Up/Down/Enter navigates.

effects.title: Gradient-spotlight card box
effects.desc: A grid of sleek dark card boxes where a mouse-hover spotlight gradient illuminates the border and background overlay in real-time.
effects.example: Hover grid → borders glow near pointer coordinate. Math-driven CSS variables update inline.
